message:
Add testing infrastructure and defensive checks

Implements InMemoryWatcher test harness, adds defensive runtime checks,
and expands test coverage across ntfs-watcher, content-extractor, ipc,
and service metrics.

Changes
-------
**ntfs-watcher (ultrasearch/crates/ntfs-watcher/src/lib.rs)**

+ InMemoryWatcher struct for testing
  Allows tests and higher-level components to inject synthetic volume
  data, MFT snapshots, and USN events without Windows kernel dependencies.

  ```rust
  pub struct InMemoryWatcher {
      vols: Vec<VolumeInfo>,
      mft: Vec<FileMeta>,
      events: Vec<FileEvent>,
  }
  ```

+ NtfsWatcher trait implementation
  discover_volumes(), enumerate_mft(), tail_usn() simply return cloned data.

+ Test: in_memory_watcher_emits_provided_data
  Verifies that synthetic data round-trips correctly through the trait.

**content-extractor (ultrasearch/crates/content-extractor/src/lib.rs)**

+ ExtractorStack::extract() empty stack guard
  ```rust
  if self.backends.is_empty() {
      let ext = resolve_ext(ctx).unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string());
      return Err(anyhow::anyhow!(ExtractError::Unsupported(ext)));
  }
  ```
  Prevents panic when no extractors are registered.

+ Test: simple_extractor_rejects_large_file
  Creates 10-byte file, ctx.max_bytes=5, verifies FileTooLarge error.

+ Test: empty_stack_returns_unsupported
  Confirms that empty ExtractorStack returns Unsupported error.

**ipc (ultrasearch/crates/ipc/src/lib.rs)**

+ Test: default_is_empty_and_safe
  Validates SearchRequest::default() produces safe, sensible values:
  - id: Uuid::nil()
  - limit: 50
  - mode: SearchMode::Auto
  - offset: 0
  - timeout: None
  - query: QueryExpr::And([])

- Removed trailing extra closing brace at EOF (formatting)

**service/metrics (ultrasearch/crates/service/src/metrics.rs)**

+ snapshot_with_queue_state() method
  Allows caller to inject current queue_depth and active_workers into
  the metrics snapshot. Useful when scheduler wants to report live state.

  ```rust
  pub fn snapshot_with_queue_state(
      &self,
      queue_depth: Option<u64>,
      active_workers: Option<u32>,
  ) -> ServiceMetricsSnapshot { ... }
  ```

+ Test: snapshot_with_queue_state_sets_fields
  Verifies that queue_depth=3, active_workers=2 appear in snapshot.

Rationale
---------
InMemoryWatcher enables unit testing of scheduler, index-worker, and
orchestration logic without Windows privileges or real volumes.

Empty stack guard prevents confusing panics when extractor registration
is incomplete or disabled (e.g., minimal builds).

Default validation test ensures IPC contracts remain backward-compatible
and safe even when clients use zero-initialization.

snapshot_with_queue_state allows metrics to reflect real-time scheduler
state beyond the Prometheus counters, useful for status endpoints.

Related
-------
- §c00.3.2 ntfs-watcher trait design
- §c00.5.1 extractor stack registration
- §c00.6.1 IPC protocol defaults
- §c00.8.3 metrics snapshot reporting
- PLAN progress log (RedSnow crate-local work)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+//! Library placeholder for the UltraSearch CLI.
+//! Currently the CLI is implemented in `main.rs`; this module exists to keep
+//! the crate structure consistent and to host shared helpers as the CLI grows.
+
+pub const VERSION: &str = env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION");
